headline: Here's How Much $1000 Invested In Lockheed Martin 15 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) has outperformed the market over the past 15 years by 1.17% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 13.16%. Currently, Lockheed Martin has a market capitalization of $118.45 billion. Buying $1000 In LMT: If an investor had bought $1000 of LMT stock 15 years ago, it would be worth $6,421.20 today based on a price of $513.76 for LMT at the time of writing.
